description: Complete the draft soil survey report for Tallahatchie County located at /home/ga/Documents/soil_survey_draft.docx. Replace the placeholders [INSERT FIGURE 1 HERE], [INSERT FIGURE 2 HERE], and [INSERT FIGURE 3 HERE] with their corresponding images from /home/ga/Documents/images/ (fig1_site_overview.jpg, fig2_soil_profile.jpg, and fig3_sampling.jpg). Each image must include its specific caption: 'Figure 1: Aerial view of Tallahatchie County survey area showing predominant Sharkey clay landscape position.', 'Figure 2: Typical Sharkey clay soil profile (0–150 cm) showing vertic properties and slickensides in the Bt horizon.', and 'Figure 3: Soil sampling at transect point T-14 using a bucket auger, illustrating the gleyed Bg horizon at 85 cm depth.' Ensure all placeholder text is removed and save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/soil_survey_complete.docx.

captions: Figure 1: Aerial view of Tallahatchie County survey area showing predominant Sharkey clay landscape position.
Figure 2: Typical Sharkey clay soil profile (0–150 cm) showing vertic properties and slickensides in the Bt horizon.
Figure 3: Soil sampling at transect point T-14 using a bucket auger, illustrating the gleyed Bg horizon at 85 cm depth.
